entities.name: PEARL MILLET
entities.description: A cereal crop subject to yield losses from various biological agents

entities.name: BIOLOGICAL AGENTS
entities.description: Organisms including diseases, insect pests, weeds, and birds that cause yield losses in crops

entities.name: YIELD LOSSES
entities.description: The reduction in crop productivity resulting from biological stressors

entities.name: DISEASES
entities.description: Pathological states in pearl millet caused by pathogens

entities.name: INSECT PESTS
entities.description: Insects that damage pearl millet crops

entities.name: WEEDS
entities.description: Unwanted plants that compete with pearl millet for resources

entities.name: GRAIN-EATING BIRDS
entities.description: Birds that consume the grains of pearl millet

entities.name: BREEDING
entities.description: The process of developing new cultivars with improved traits such as resistance

entities.name: DURABLE RESISTANCE
entities.description: Resistance to biological agents that remains effective over time and across environments

entities.name: DISEASE RESISTANCE
entities.description: The ability of a cultivar to resist infection or damage from disease pathogens

entities.name: DISEASE PATHOGENS
entities.description: Microorganisms that cause diseases in pearl millet

entities.name: SCREENING TECHNIQUES
entities.description: Methods used to evaluate and identify cultivars with resistance to pests or weeds

entities.name: INTEGRATED CONTROL STRATEGIES
entities.description: Combined approaches to manage and control insect pests

entities.name: WITCHWEED
entities.description: A specific weed species that affects pearl millet

entities.name: CULTURAL PRACTICES
entities.description: Agricultural management techniques used to control pests like shibra

entities.name: BREEDING TECHNIQUES
entities.description: Specific genetic improvement methods used to control pests like shibra

entities.name: SHIBRA
entities.description: A pest or disease complex affecting pearl millet in specific regions
